## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Hex for AI-driven content strategy and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hex seeks to scale high-quality content production for SEO and brand purposes while maintaining authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content strategy, creation, and optimization with a focus on becoming the best answer to audience questions](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Key success factors: signal-driven approach, iterative improvement, and efficient review processes](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Hex team to evaluate internal readiness and review proposal by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Quality Concerns

  - [Previous agency struggled with SEO/GEO strategy and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Hex CEO has high content standards, resistant to "content without soul"](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Challenge: Scaling content production while maintaining quality and purpose](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [GrowthX approach: Audience-first, creating knowledge graphs of relevant questions](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Focus on becoming the best answer while naturally incorporating brand/product](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### AI-Driven Content Creation Process

  - [Use of research agents to create comprehensive research plans](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Multiple citations and enriched content from various sources](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Iterative improvement of content over time](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Workflow optimization with humans-in-the-loop for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Partnership Structure and Expectations

  - [Typical partners: Head of Marketing, PMM, Head of Growth](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint to de-risk partnership](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Estimated 10 hours of client investment in first 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Ongoing commitment of 30-60 minutes per week for reviews](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Metrics and Reporting

  - [Weekly metric reports and accessible dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Custom event tracking for conversions (e.g., PostHog integration)](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Focus on moving key metrics before making strategic changes](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Hex's Concerns and Next Steps

  - [Main fear: Review cycle bottlenecks and labor-intensive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Need to ensure proper internal support and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Ashley to contact Mario (Airby) for insights on supporting the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Hex team to review SOW and decide by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ashley to email Mario for insights on supporting content partnership](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Hex team to review GrowthX's Statement of Work](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Hex to provide decision on moving forward by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [If proceeding, prepare for 8-week strategy sprint to kickstart the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/Rd8_sLBsqt_E1EgsFoT_X1dxPVxcbt63?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
